input.command:
for d in 2026/01/13 2026/01/14; do
  f="articles/$d/articles.jsonl"; [ -f "$f" ] || continue
  echo "=== $d ==="
  cat "$f" | python3 -c "
import sys,json,re
kw=re.compile(r'syria.*(holiday|festival|language|decree|national|kurdish|syriac)|guehi.*(transfer|sign|club)|ukraine.*(combat plane|fighter|rafale|f-16)|governor.*(investigation|doj|justice|pritzker)',re.I)
seen=set()
for line in sys.stdin:
    try: a=json.loads(line)
    except: continue
    t=a.get('title','')
    if kw.search(t) and t not in seen:
        seen.add(t); print(' -',(a.get('source','?'))[:16],'|',t[:125])
" | head -12
done
